scripts.build: node -e "const {spawnSync}=require('child_process'); if(!process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL){process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL='http://localhost:5000/api/v1';} if(!process.env.NEXTAUTH_SECRET){console.error('NEXTAUTH_SECRET must be set'); process.exit(1);} const nextBin=require.resolve('next/dist/bin/next'); const result=spawnSync(process.execPath,[nextBin,'build','--no-lint'],{stdio:'inherit',env:process.env}); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
scripts.test: cd ../backend && python -m pytest; status=$?; if [ $status -eq 5 ]; then echo "No unit tests collected"; exit 0; fi; exit $status
scripts.test:integration: if [ -f ../backend/test_endpoints.py ]; then python ../backend/test_endpoints.py; else echo "No integration test script found"; fi
scripts.test:live: if [ -f ../backend/test_live.py ]; then python ../backend/test_live.py; else echo "No e2e/live test script found"; fi
